name: Farmers Market
description: Direct-to-consumer at local markets. Higher price, lower volume.

name: Grocery Chain
description: Large supermarket chains. Moderate price, high volume.

name: Food Processor
description: Industrial processing plants. Lower price, massive volume.

name: Restaurant Group
description: Local and chain restaurants. Good price for fresh produce.

name: Grain Elevator
description: Commodity storage and resale. Standard price, huge capacity.

name: Export Broker
description: International trade intermediaries. Good for large lots.

name: Ethanol Plant
description: Biofuel producers. Lowest price, very reliable off-take.

name: Craft Brewery
description: Local craft beer producers. Premium for local Ontario hops.

name: Feed Mill
description: Livestock feed manufacturers. Stable demand, moderate price.

name: Livestock Producer
description: Direct to farm for hay and forage. Eliminates middleman.

name: Specialty Buyer
description: Health food distributors and specialty retailers.

name: Tobacco Company
description: Contracted purchase by licensed tobacco processors.
